release_notes: MBT POS 3.0.12: Publish channel catch-up. AppData local backups (fixes Live Backup ERROR on Program Files). Portal /licenses redirect. Touch-target footer + Return/Exchange panel wiring. Keeps 3.0.11 snappy POS open + 3.0.10 offline fail-open. Business-day picker included.
checksum_note: Publish SHA-256 in GitHub release notes as [checksum_sha256: HEX] and/or upload MBT_POS_Setup.exe.sha256 sidecar. Required for unattended install.
